description:
Create an anonymous course evaluation feedback form in the World History (HIST201) course using the admin credentials (username: admin, password: Admin1234!). The feedback activity should be named "End of Semester Course Evaluation" with the description "Please provide your honest feedback about this course. All responses are anonymous." Configure the activity to record user names anonymously, disallow multiple submissions, and ensure it is visible. The form must include these five questions:
- Multiple choice: "How would you rate the overall quality of this course?" (Choices: Excellent, Good, Average, Poor)
- Numeric answer: "On a scale of 1 to 10, how likely are you to recommend this course to a fellow student?" (Range: 1-10)
- Short text answer: "What was the most valuable topic covered in this course?"
- Longer text answer: "What improvements would you suggest for future offerings of this course?"
- Multiple choice: "How effective was the instructor at explaining complex historical concepts?" (Choices: Very Effective, Effective, Somewhat Effective, Not Effective)
